LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT JANE VILTMAN'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: OVERRULED WITH FIFTEEN DAYS TO ANSWER. THE MOVING PARTY FAILED TO PROVIDE COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS IN COMPLIANCE WITH SAN FRANCISCO LOCAL RULE 2.6B AND THE COURT'S JUNE 28 RULING DIRECTING THE MOVING PARTY TO DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302 NO LATER THAN 4PM JUNE 29. ORDER SIGNED. (302/HEK) JUDGE HAROLD KAHN; NOT REPORTED
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY ATTORNEY VILTMAN, VLADIE P.
ASSIGNMENT TO ARBITRATION OF SEP-28-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR - DISMISSAL ON FILE.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-21-2012 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 2:00 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE APR-06-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-21-2012 CONTINUED TO JUL-17-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE MAY-21-2012 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT JANE VILTMAN'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO JULY 6, 2012 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302 TO PROVIDE THE MOVING PARTY AN OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. THE MOVING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS TO DEPT. 302 NO LATER THAN 4PM JUNE 29 WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE OR THE DEMURRER WILL BE OVERRULED. THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPPOSING PAPERS. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER CSR # 5976

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-06-2012 Overruled
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT JANE VILTMAN'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.
Appearances: Daron D. Tong of Miller & Tong, LLP (409.5222) for plaintiff and responding party; no other appearances.
The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Overruled with fifteen days to answer. The moving party failed to provide courtesy copies of the moving papers in compliance with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B and the Court's June 28 ruling directing the moving party to deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to department 302 no later than 4pm June 29. Order signed. (302/HEK) Judge Harold Kahn; Not reported

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-28-2012 Continued To Jul-06-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT JANE VILTMAN's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is Continued to July 6, 2012 at 9:30 AM in Dept. 302 to provide the moving party an opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. The moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Dept. 302 no later than 4pm June 29 with a cover letter stating the new hearing date or the demurrer will be overruled. The court has courtesy copies of the opposing papers. Judge: Harold Kahn; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR # 5976
